use_cases: Display client or partner logos as social proof on landing pages
Showcase technology integrations or tool stacks
Build trust and credibility by highlighting well-known customers
Create an 'as seen in' or 'trusted by' section on marketing sites
ai_summary: A clean, responsive client logo grid component designed to showcase brand logos as social proof. Features a centered header with descriptive text and a responsive grid layout that adapts from 2 columns on mobile to 4 columns on desktop. Uses SVG logos for crisp rendering at any size and follows a minimalist flat design approach suitable for professional B2B and marketing contexts.
